# tshasan.com

Taimur Hasan is a software engineer specializing in AI platform and infrastructure. He has experience with on-device AI and browser internals, and writes about software, systems, and building things well.

This site is his personal home on the web: a place to share his work, his writing, and how to reach him.

## Pages

- [Home](https://tshasan.com): who he is
- [Blog](https://tshasan.com/blog/): writing on software and the web
- [Elsewhere](https://tshasan.com/elsewhere/): press coverage and links to find him

## Selected writing

- [I Just Wanted to Make Something](https://tshasan.com/blog/i-just-wanted-to-make-something.html): on building with plain HTML and CSS, resisting unnecessary complexity, and using tools on your own terms

## Press

- [Fox Recap — Mozilla Blog](https://blog.mozilla.org/en/firefox/firefox-recap/)
- [Developer Spotlight — Mozilla Add-ons](https://blog.mozilla.org/addons/2025/10/21/developer-spotlight-fox-recap/)

## Contact
